title: Senior DCM Banker – Debt Capital Markets Origination & Global Sales
description:
Job Summary

Our client, a leading foreign bank, seeks a Senior DCM Origination & Sales Specialist to lead bond origination and execution, cultivate client relationships across Southeast Asia and Greater China, and deliver strategic market insights that drive capital markets growth.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the origination, structuring, and execution of bond offerings, managing documentation, due diligence, and investor engagement to ensure successful deal closure
  • Develop and sustain strong relationships with corporate and institutional clients in Southeast Asia and Greater China to expand the bank’s debt capital markets footprint
  • Drive business development initiatives by generating innovative ideas and actively participating in client pitching and marketing activities to secure new opportunities
  • Provide strategic and timely market insights on debt issuance processes, pricing trends, and investor appetite to inform decision-making and optimize deal outcomes
  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders, including relationship managers and credit approval teams, to facilitate seamless and compliant deal execution
  • Coordinate with regional offices and global internal teams to identify and grow DCM and cross-border business opportunities, enhancing the bank’s market presence
  • Represent the bank in client meetings, roadshows, and investor discussions to strengthen client engagement and promote the bank’s offerings
  • Execute additional assignments or responsibilities as directed by the Head of Department or management to support team objectives

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proven track record in debt origination and hands-on experience in deal execution within Debt Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Corporate/Institutional Banking
  • Strong command of English and Mandarin to effectively communicate with international and Chinese-speaking clients and internal stakeholders

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related discipline
  • Minimum 4 years of relevant experience in Debt Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Corporate/Institutional Banking
  • Demonstrated analytical skills applied to market data and deal structuring to support origination and execution decisions
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and Bloomberg Terminal to analyze financial data and prepare client presentations
  • Effective presentation and negotiation skills demonstrated in client interactions and deal discussions
  • Confident, collaborative, and driven interpersonal skills to foster teamwork and build client trust

postedCompany.description:
At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
postedCompany.name: GREENLANE PRIVATE LTD.
